intro_section.description: I build modern and functional user-oriented interfaces.

about_me_section.description: Frontend Developer with expert knowledge of HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript, specializing in responsive landing pages and high-conversion HTML email templates. I build modern, interactive user interfaces using React and TypeScript with a focus on UI/UX and pixel-perfect design. With hands-on experience in HubSpot, Mailchimp, and WordPress, I bridge the gap between marketing needs and technical execution. My background in Java and SQL (PostgreSQL/MySQL) provides a deep understanding of the full development lifecycle. I deliver clean code, meet tight deadlines, and am fluent in English.

stack_section.title: My Stack
stack_section.description: Tools and technologies I use to build awesome projects.

experience_section.title: Experience & Education
experience_section.subtitle: My professional journey in development and the academic foundation that helps me create quality products.
experience_section.web_description: Specialized in building responsive email campaigns and landing pages from scratch based on provided designs. Ensured pixel-perfect layouts and consistent rendering across all major email clients.
experience_section.unv_description: Focused on IT project management, software architecture, and advanced web development principles.

footer.quote_text: Any fool can write code that a computer can understand. Good programmers write code that humans can understand.
